targets.rawSql:
select count(*)::int as idle_in_tx_count
from pg_stat_activity
where datname = '${db_name}'
  and state = 'idle in transaction'
  and xact_start is not null
  and now() - xact_start > interval '5 minutes';

select count(*)::int as long_running_active_count
from pg_stat_activity
where datname = '${db_name}'
  and state = 'active'
  and query_start is not null
  and now() - query_start > interval '2 minutes';

with blocked as (
  select distinct a.pid
  from pg_stat_activity a
  join pg_locks la on la.pid = a.pid and not la.granted
  join pg_locks lb on lb.locktype = la.locktype
     and lb.database is not distinct from la.database
     and lb.relation is not distinct from la.relation
     and lb.page is not distinct from la.page
     and lb.tuple is not distinct from la.tuple
     and lb.virtualxid is not distinct from la.virtualxid
     and lb.transactionid is not distinct from la.transactionid
     and lb.classid is not distinct from la.classid
     and lb.objid is not distinct from la.objid
     and lb.objsubid is not distinct from la.objsubid
     and lb.pid <> la.pid
  where lb.granted
)
select count(*)::int as blocked_sessions
from blocked;

select pid, usename, application_name, client_addr,
       now() - xact_start as idle_tx_age, wait_event_type, wait_event, left(query, 300) as query
from pg_stat_activity
where datname = '${db_name}'
  and state = 'idle in transaction'
  and xact_start is not null
order by idle_tx_age desc
limit 100;

select pid, usename, application_name, client_addr,
       now() - query_start as query_age, wait_event_type, wait_event, left(query, 300) as query
from pg_stat_activity
where datname = '${db_name}'
  and state = 'active'
  and query_start is not null
order by query_age desc
limit 100;

select a.pid as blocked_pid,
       now() - a.query_start as blocked_age,
       a.usename as blocked_user,
       left(a.query, 200) as blocked_query,
       b.pid as blocker_pid,
       now() - b.query_start as blocker_age,
       b.usename as blocker_user,
       left(b.query, 200) as blocker_query
from pg_stat_activity a
join pg_locks la on la.pid = a.pid and not la.granted
join pg_locks lb on lb.locktype = la.locktype
   and lb.database is not distinct from la.database
   and lb.relation is not distinct from la.relation
   and lb.page is not distinct from la.page
   and lb.tuple is not distinct from la.tuple
   and lb.virtualxid is not distinct from la.virtualxid
   and lb.transactionid is not distinct from la.transactionid
   and lb.classid is not distinct from la.classid
   and lb.objid is not distinct from la.objid
   and lb.objsubid is not distinct from la.objsubid
   and lb.pid <> la.pid
join pg_stat_activity b on b.pid = lb.pid
where lb.granted
order by blocked_age desc
limit 100;
